name: add_dependency_shell
description: Adds one or more software dependencies to the project by executing the appropriate package manager command (e.g., npm, yarn, pip, cargo). This is a shell-based version. Use when specific flags or advanced package manager features are needed that are not covered by a more abstract add_dependency tool. Specify the full command for the package manager.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

command.description: The full shell command to add dependencies (e.g., 'npm install react react-dom', 'pip install -r requirements.txt', 'yarn add lodash --dev').

working_directory.description: Optional subdirectory within project_path where the command should be run. Defaults to project_path itself.

hints.description: This tool modifies project dependencies and lock files. It is destructive. Idempotency depends on the specific package manager command.
